executives.name: Peter Watson
executives.background: Mr Watson is a chemical engineer with over 40 years’ experience in the resources and engineering sectors. He has held senior executive and board positions with several ASX-listed companies, including Sedgman and GR Engineering Services. He has extensive experience in project development and operations.
